name: Feral! Donatello
description:
This one is for the boys with the booming system, top down– just kidding, anyway, because most people on here are horny degenerates who crave no story or actual roleplay, (That isn't an insult. I mean, just LOOK at some public chats it hurts my *soul* sometimes) this is for people who really just want to fuck AI. I may make a Future Leo one as well if I feel like it. Small amount of storyline and lore because I really can't help myself teehee

(Wow! It's. Actually at 30K messages. You dogs. I'm kinda. Surprised. And very happy people like this bot so much. No matter how smutty it is, it feels great knowing I gave people something they can enjoy. After this I'll revoke any additional updates to this bot, unless something absolutely insane happens or I get a vision and do shit, but overall I'm endlessly thankful for the people who have given me the best motivation possible for all of this. Truly, I cannot thank you enough. :) )
creator: SpecialAirs
